title: Tideworn Datapack
description: A Datapack Made to make the Tideworn map survival more friendly.
body:
# Tideworn UnOffical Survival Datapack
This Datapack makes the map Tideworn more survival friendly, practically making it possible to not just survive but thrive. It's made to be balanced and multiplayer friendly.

## Note:
The map is already survival friendly, this is for people who cant find the loot in random barrels, or people who want to host multiplayer on said map.

### MAP LINK
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/tideworn-forgotten-flooded-city

By: [Milkshake___](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/milkshake___)
